evidence.description: Full unittest suite (97 tests, incl. the new adversarial regressions) at the signed work head, run by GitHub Actions.
Re-run the full test suite at the signed head; allowlisted in .agent-receipts/policy.yml, executed by the gate without a shell in a contained cwd.
The v0.2 receipt JSON Schema this receipt itself conforms to (cwd pattern tightened in this revision).

evidence.claim: All 5 gpt-5.5 review findings fixed and regression-tested; the three key new tests were mutation-checked to fail against the pre-fix gate. SECURITY-MODEL.md updated to state the remaining residuals plainly.

judgment_calls: Config-touching PRs are no longer waivable at the gate; landing them requires a branch-protection admin bypass. Chosen over waiver-with-approval because label semantics cannot approve a change to who is trusted.

Waiver applier verification requires write/maintain/admin via the collaborator-permission API and fails closed when unprovable; residual (stolen maintainer credential still waives) documented in SECURITY-MODEL.md.
Dogfood workflow runs the verifier from a base-ref checkout; while the gate is absent from main (this PR), the job emits a bootstrap notice and executes nothing from the PR.
require_request_binding is now true; issuer flow is tasks/pr-<N>.md on the base branch. This PR itself is judged in bootstrap mode since main carries no trust anchor yet.

Mutation-checked the 3 highest-value regression tests by re-introducing each bug and watching the test fail; restored via git checkout which also reverted gate.py, then rebuilt it — final state re-verified by the full suite.

request.preview: Fix the 5 gpt-5.5 REQUEST-CHANGES findings on the v2 gate (self-referential gate bypass, ci_attested sha unbound, re_executable cwd escape, request-binding disarmed, unaudited waiver) + 3 mediums; add regression tests for the 5 uncovered attacks; keep docs honest; re-sign the PR receipt.
request.source: Task message from team lead (CC), 2026-07-08: gpt-5.5 adversarial-review remediation for PR #3; exact bytes retained by issuer and build agent
